picks.quote: Then he put him away. Stipe... was done. Africa had its first heavyweight champion, and Patient Ganu was fully realized.
Everyone thought he was going to get destroyed. Instead, he knocked Rockold out cold.
The result was brutal. Weidman finished a visibly deflated Belelfford in the first round.
In the second round, DDP dropped Whitaker with a stiff jab and finished him... The seemingly unconquerable gatekeeper was done.
Every time someone knocked down Olivivera, they thought they had him. But that's when he was most dangerous.
